identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a worship team app that feels like a Sunday morning: bright, organized, and uplifting, avoiding the sterile 'spreadsheet' look of typical admin tools.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and modal titles. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all standard text, inputs, and data tables. Excellent legibility at small sizes.

primary.description: Deep Slate Blue - Authority and Calm

secondary.description: Cool Grey - Backgrounds and secondary buttons

accent.description: Warm Amber - For 'Worship', 'Music', and primary actions

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture on the main background if possible to reduce digital sterility.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-full font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-6 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent h-10 px-4 rounded-full transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/20 focus:border-accent transition-all bg-slate-50/50

status_badges.confirmed: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide
status_badges.declined: bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

instructions_to_main_agent.file_type: Use .js extensions for all files. Do not use TypeScript syntax.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react for all icons (Calendar, Music, Users, Mic, Guitar, etc).
instructions_to_main_agent.date_handling: Use date-fns for all date formatting.
instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: Use simple React useState/useEffect. No Redux needed for this MVP.
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Create a robust 'mockData.js' file to simulate the database. Do not leave the app empty.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Create a SidebarLayout component that wraps the main content. Use a dark sidebar for contrast.

universal_guidelines.animation: Add 'transition-all duration-200' to all interactive elements. Use 'animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4' for page loads.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use semantic HTML (main, section, article).
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and cards (e.g., data-testid='add-member-btn').
